discharged_obligations.PO-BH-23: PARTIAL: finite-width overlap moment scaffold and rank-three condition derived; actual rank-three Yukawa theorem remains open unless internal eigenfunction independence is derived

formulas.Mabcd: M_abcd=integral xi_a xi_b xi_c xi_d Phi(y) dV_gamma
formulas.active_mode_expansion: Psi_A_i(y)=Psi_A_i(y0)+xi^a partial_a Psi_A_i(y0)+1/2 xi^a xi^b partial_a partial_b Psi_A_i(y0)+...
formulas.moment_expansion: I_ij=M0 a_i^* b_j + M_ab (partial_a a_i^*)(partial_b b_j) + higher finite-width moments
formulas.rank_three_condition: rank(I_f)=3 if finite-width moment contributions span three independent row/column structures
formulas.sharp_peak_rank_bound: rank(I)<=1 for strict point-sampling I_ij=a_i^* b_j
formulas.singlet_mode_expansion: Psi_S_i(y)=Psi_S_i(y0)+xi^a partial_a Psi_S_i(y0)+1/2 xi^a xi^b partial_a partial_b Psi_S_i(y0)+...
formulas.universal_width_guardrail: sigma must be fixed by internal geometry and cannot be tuned by flavor or generation

negative_results: strict point sampling alone does not derive rank-three Yukawa matrices
finite-width rank-three not promoted without internal eigenfunction independence
numerical Yukawa values not derived in this branch
fermion mass ratios not derived in this branch
CKM values not derived in this branch
PMNS values not derived in this branch
notes: finite-width moments provide a symbolic route beyond the outer-product term
rank-three condition is derived but not proven satisfied
universal sigma guardrail forbids flavor/generation width fitting

rank_components.guardrail: strict point sampling cannot produce rank three
rank_components.name: sharp_peak_outer_product
rank_components.statement: rank(I)<=1 for strict point-sampling I_ij=a_i^* b_j

rank_components.guardrail: symbolic expansion only; no numerical moments computed
rank_components.name: finite_width_moment_expansion
rank_components.statement: I_ij=M0 a_i^* b_j + M_ab (partial_a a_i^*)(partial_b b_j) + higher finite-width moments

rank_components.name: rank_three_condition
rank_components.statement: rank(I_f)=3 if finite-width moment contributions span three independent row/column structures

rank_components.guardrail: requires BHSM eigenfunction theorem or computation
rank_components.name: internal_eigenfunction_independence
rank_components.statement: the sets {a_i, partial_a a_i, partial_a partial_b a_i, ...} and {b_j, partial_a b_j, partial_a partial_b b_j, ...}, contracted with universal profile moments, must provide at least three independent matrix structures

rank_components.guardrail: no flavor or generation tuning of sigma
rank_components.name: universal_width_guardrail
rank_components.statement: sigma must be fixed by internal geometry and cannot be tuned by flavor or generation

rank_results.finite_width_moments: can raise rank if independent internal eigenfunction moment structures are derived
